commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=fae731865acb7c39d6f53afc330ff31a2cc3b349)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `session.reset.mode: "adaptive"` with AND semantics across reset policy, config schema/help, docs, session hook reason wiring, and focused tests, while also carrying unrelated formatting-only churn.

PR surface: Source +10, Tests +206, Docs +4, Generated 0, Other +2. Total +222 across 42 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source: current main accepts only `daily` and `idle`, rejects `adaptive` in Zod schema, and evaluates daily/idle expiry with OR semantics. This is a feature gap rather than a strict bug repro, and I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A repair worker can handle the mechanical SDK-visible result-shape issue; maintainer acceptance of the new config and hook contract remains a separate merge decision.

target.title: feat(sessions): add adaptive reset mode with daily AND idle semantics
target.body:
## Summary

- Problem: Session reset currently supports only `daily` and `idle`, and when both are configured the behavior is OR-based, which can reset an active conversation as soon as the daily boundary passes.
- Why it matters: Some users want the daily rollover guard without interrupting active conversations, meaning reset should happen only after the boundary has passed and the session has gone idle.
- What changed: Added `mode: "adaptive"` as a narrow reset mode that requires both the daily boundary and the idle window before a session becomes stale, and updated the schema/help/session wiring to match.
- What did NOT change (scope boundary): This PR does not add new reset fields, change the default reset mode, or alter existing `daily` and `idle` semantics.

## Change Type (select all)

- [ ] Bug fix
- [x] Feature
- [ ] Refactor required for the fix
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Security hardening
- [ ] Chore/infra

## Scope (select all touched areas)

- [x] Gateway / orchestration
- [ ] Skills / tool execution
- [ ] Auth / tokens
- [ ] Memory / storage
- [ ] Integrations
- [x] API / contracts
- [x] UI / DX
- [ ] CI/CD / infra

## Linked Issue/PR

- Closes #43738
- Related #44489
- [ ] This PR fixes a bug or regression

## Root Cause (if applicable)

- Root cause: N/A
- Missing detection / guardrail: N/A
- Contributing context (if known): N/A

## Regression Test Plan (if applicable)

N/A

## User-visible / Behavior Changes

- `session.reset.mode` accepts a new value: `"adaptive"`.
- `adaptive` resets a session only when both conditions are met:
  - the daily reset boundary has passed
  - the configured idle window has expired
- Existing `daily` and `idle` behavior remains unchanged.

## Diagram (if applicable)

```text
Before:
[daily stale] OR [idle stale] -> reset

After:
mode=daily/idle -> existing behavior unchanged
mode=adaptive -> [daily stale] AND [idle stale] -> reset
```

## Security Impact (required)

- New permissions/capabilities? (`No`)
- Secrets/tokens handling changed? (`No`)
- New/changed network calls? (`No`)
- Command/tool execution surface changed? (`No`)
- Data access scope changed? (`No`)
- If any `Yes`, explain risk + mitigation:

## Repro + Verification

### Environment

- OS: macOS
- Runtime/container: local source checkout
- Model/provider: N/A
- Integration/channel (if any): N/A
- Relevant config (redacted): session reset policy with `atHour` and `idleMinutes`

### Steps

1. Configure session reset mode as `adaptive` with `atHour` and `idleMinutes`.
2. Evaluate freshness when only the daily boundary is crossed.
3. Evaluate freshness when only the idle window expires.
4. Evaluate freshness when both are true.

### Expected

- Daily-only stale: session remains fresh.
- Idle-only stale: session remains fresh.
- Both stale: session resets.
- Existing `daily` and `idle` modes behave exactly as before.

### Actual

- Added adaptive-mode policy tests plus schema/session behavior coverage.
- Updated schema/help/generated config surfaces and session handling.
- Focused Vitest suite passed.

## Real behavior proof

- **Behavior or issue addressed:** `session.reset.mode: "adaptive"` should keep an existing session fresh when only the daily boundary or only the idle window is stale, and should roll the session only when both conditions are stale.
- **Real environment tested:** Local OpenClaw source checkout on macOS at exact head `7f8daf011b6b84b0aa4571ccf46ad61f8938013f`, running the production reset policy evaluator through the source-built tsx path plus focused `initSessionState` regression tests.
- **Exact steps or command run after this patch:** Ran an exact-head one-shot runtime proof with `OPENCLAW_ADAPTIVE_RESET_PROOF_HEAD=$(git rev-parse --short=12 HEAD) node --import tsx --input-type=module`, importing `evaluateSessionFreshness` and `resolveSessionResetPolicy` from `src/config/sessions/reset.js` and evaluating daily-only, idle-only, and both-stale adaptive cases.
- **Evidence after fix:** Terminal output from that runtime proof:

  ```json
  {
    "head": "7f8daf011b6b",
    "source": "src/config/sessions/reset.js evaluateSessionFreshness via tsx",
    "policy": {
      "mode": "adaptive",
      "atHour": 4,
      "idleMinutes": 60,
      "configured": true
    },
    "cases": [
      {
        "name": "daily-only-stale",
        "expected": {
          "fresh": true,
          "staleDaily": true,
          "staleIdle": false
        },
        "actual": {
          "fresh": true,
          "staleDaily": true,
          "staleIdle": false,
          "staleReason": null
        }
      },
      {
        "name": "idle-only-stale",
        "expected": {
          "fresh": true,
          "staleDaily": false,
          "staleIdle": true
        },
        "actual": {
          "fresh": true,
          "staleDaily": false,
          "staleIdle": true,
          "staleReason": null
        }
      },
      {
        "name": "daily-and-idle-stale",
        "expected": {
          "fresh": false,
          "staleDaily": true,
          "staleIdle": true,
          "staleReason": "adaptive"
        },
        "actual": {
          "fresh": false,
          "staleDaily": true,
          "staleIdle": true,
          "staleReason": "adaptive"
        }
      }
    ],
    "verdict": "PASS: adaptive reset requires both daily and idle stale conditions."
  }
  ```

- **Observed result after fix:** The production reset evaluator preserves freshness when only one adaptive condition is stale, and marks the session stale with reason `adaptive` only when both daily and idle conditions are stale. The focused session suite also passed the `initSessionState` regression path for adaptive session reuse.
- **What was not tested:** Full interactive Telegram delivery flow. A raw standalone `initSessionState` proof attempt did not complete cleanly outside the test harness, so the exact-head runtime proof above targets the production reset evaluator while the session initializer path is covered by the focused Vitest suite.
## Evidence

Attach at least one:

- [x] Failing test/log before + passing after
- [ ] Trace/log snippets
- [ ] Screenshot/recording
- [ ] Perf numbers (if relevant)

## Human Verification (required)

What you personally verified (not just CI), and how:

- Verified scenarios:
  - adaptive policy stays fresh when only one side is stale
  - adaptive policy resets when both daily and idle conditions are stale
  - schema accepts `mode: "adaptive"`
  - session-related tests still pass with the new mode wired through
- Edge cases checked:
  - adaptive mode defaults an idle window when omitted in policy resolution
  - schema/help/generated config surfaces remain aligned
- What you did **not** verify:
  - remote GitHub CI beyond the local focused suite and `check:changed`

## Review Conversations

- [x] I replied to or resolved every bot review conversation I addressed in this PR.
- [x] I left unresolved only the conversations that still need reviewer or maintainer judgment.

If a bot review conversation is addressed by this PR, resolve that conversation yourself. Do not leave bot review conversation cleanup for maintainers.

## Compatibility / Migration

- Backward compatible? (`Yes`)
- Config/env changes? (`No`)
- Migration needed? (`No`)
- If yes, exact upgrade steps:

## Risks and Mitigations

- Risk: AND/OR freshness logic could be implemented incorrectly and silently change reset behavior.
  - Mitigation: Added focused policy tests for both-one-neither stale combinations while preserving existing mode behavior.
- Risk: Config/schema layers could drift if `adaptive` is added in one validation surface but not another.
  - Mitigation: update type union, Zod schema, generated schema/help text, and session wiring together.
- Risk: stale-session reason/reporting paths could become misleading if adaptive mode is only partially wired.
  - Mitigation: included session-related tests and the current session/reset handling surfaces in the same change.

## Latest local validation

Current head: `7f8daf011b6b84b0aa4571ccf46ad61f8938013f`

Branch history: rebased onto current `origin/main` and force-pushed after refreshing generated config docs and formatting the adaptive reset policy file.

Local validation on the current head:

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/config/sessions/sessions.test.ts src/config/zod-schema.session-maintenance-extensions.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/session.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/session-hooks-context.test.ts` — passed 2 shards / 159 tests
- `pnpm config:docs:check` — passed
- `pnpm deadcode:unused-files` — passed
- `npx oxfmt --check <touched docs/config/session/plugin files>` — passed
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD && git diff --check` — passed
- `git merge-tree --write-tree HEAD origin/main` — passed
- Exact-head adaptive reset runtime proof above — passed

Validation limitation:

- `pnpm lint --threads=8` currently fails on unrelated existing oxlint findings in ACP/agents/media/TUI test helpers, not in the adaptive-reset touched files.

GitHub status after pushing this head:

- `gh pr view 71400 --repo openclaw/openclaw --json mergeable,mergeStateStatus,headRefOid` — head matches `7f8daf011b6b84b0aa4571ccf46ad61f8938013f`; mergeability reports `MERGEABLE`; merge state reports `UNSTABLE` while fresh CI is still settling.


## Latest rebase/proof refresh (2026-06-10)

Current head: `7f8daf011b6b84b0aa4571ccf46ad61f8938013f`

Rebased onto current `origin/main` (`78a5e3ede7387b58f6e13319d240fbfd1ac02cd9`) and regenerated the config docs baseline hash for the rebased schema surface.

Validation on the current head:

```bash
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/config/sessions/sessions.test.ts src/config/zod-schema.session-maintenance-extensions.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/session.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/session-hooks-context.test.ts
pnpm config:docs:check
pnpm deadcode:unused-files
git diff --check origin/main...HEAD && git diff --check
git merge-tree --write-tree HEAD origin/main
npx oxfmt --check docs/.generated/config-baseline.sha256 docs/agent-sessions.md docs/configuration.md docs/control-ui.md src/config/sessions/reset-policy.ts src/config/sessions/sessions.test.ts src/config/types.base.ts src/config/zod-schema.ts src/auto-reply/reply/session.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/session.ts
OPENCLAW_ADAPTIVE_RESET_PROOF_HEAD=$(git rev-parse --short=12 HEAD) node --import tsx --input-type=module <exact adaptive reset proof>
```

Observed results:

- Focused Vitest passed 2 shards / 167 tests.
- `pnpm config:docs:check` passed.
- `pnpm deadcode:unused-files` passed.
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD && git diff --check` passed.
- `git merge-tree --write-tree HEAD origin/main` passed.
- Focused `oxfmt --check` passed.
- Exact-head adaptive reset proof passed on `7f8daf011b6b`: daily-only stale stayed fresh, idle-only stale stayed fresh, and daily-plus-idle stale reset with `staleReason: "adaptive"`.
